[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100111111 8
1 1111111111 a
2 1100111110 7
3 0010000110 3
4 1011100111 7
5 1111111011 9
6 1100100101 5
7 0010111010 5

70 07 1101111111 9
